text: Micron finished the week in the red despite a blockbuster earnings report. But falling oil prices was good news for the fight against inflation.
zh: 尽管美光科技发布了重磅收益报告，但本周仍出现亏损。但油价下跌对于对抗通胀来说是个好消息。

title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
text: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

title: Your health insurer shouldn’t decide your treatment plan. That’s what your doctor (and possibly AI) should be doing.
title_zh: 您的健康保险公司不应该决定您的治疗计划。这就是你的医生（可能还有人工智能）应该做的。
text: With a digital health record, clinicians and AI-driven diagnostic tools would be able to see your full health history — and then make better decisions.
zh: 有了数字健康记录，临床医生和人工智能驱动的诊断工具将能够查看您的完整健康史，然后做出更好的决策。

title: I had gallbladder surgery. After I got home, the hospital asked me for a financial donation. Is this ethical?
title_zh: 我做了胆囊手术。回家后，医院要求我捐款。这符合道德吗？
text: “The letter asked whether I had a favorite caregiver and if I would like to make a contribution in their honor.”
zh: “这封信询问我是否有最喜欢的看护者，以及我是否愿意为他们的荣誉做出贡献。”

title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies

text: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."
zh: Anthropic 禁止访问其《神鬼寓言 5》和《神话 5》模型，以遵守政府引用“国家安全当局”的出口管制指令。

title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
title_zh: 中国智普正在逼近美国顶级人工智能模型，Anthropic和OpenAI受阻
text: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.
zh: 智普的 GLM 5.2 表明，人工智能之争正在转向谁能以每美元提供最多的智能，这使得开源突然成为真正的竞争者。

title: After losing my son, would it be a mistake to sell my recently purchased house and move to my hometown?
title_zh: 失去儿子后，卖掉新买的房子搬到老家会不会是一个错误？
text: “I raised my children there as a single mother, and it was the last home my son lived in before he passed away unexpectedly.”
zh: “我作为一个单身母亲在那里抚养了我的孩子，这是我儿子意外去世之前住的最后一个家。”

title: Tesla and Waymo duel in the robotaxi race — but the company spending the most builds no cars at all

zh: Uber 正在悄悄开出 5 亿美元的支票来锁定机器人出租车，而 Waymo 则威胁要放弃它。

title: SpaceX stock has cooled. Hiring for jobs in the space economy hasn't
title_zh: SpaceX 的股价已经降温。太空经济领域的就业岗位尚未招聘
text: The SpaceX IPO euphoria is over, but the bullish trend in space economy jobs remains in place within a labor market where many other sectors have slowed hiring.
zh: SpaceX IPO 的狂热已经结束，但在许多其他行业放缓招聘的劳动力市场中，太空经济就业的看涨趋势仍然存在。

title: Before there were Trump Accounts, SEED OK gave some newborns $1,000 — how researchers say the grants affected kids
title_zh: 在特朗普账户出现之前，SEED OK 向一些新生儿提供了 1,000 美元——研究人员称这些赠款如何影响孩子
text: Some state-sponsored programs paved the way for Trump Accounts, the new tax-deferred investing accounts for children.
zh: 一些国家资助的项目为特朗普账户（新的儿童递延税投资账户）铺平了道路。

title: American couple left New York City and bought a house in Italy for $13,000: 'We found a different way of life'
title_zh: 美国夫妇离开纽约，以 13,000 美元在意大利买了房子：“我们找到了不同的生活方式”
text: Cassandra Tresl and Alex Ninman moved in with Tresl's grandfather in the Czech Republic in 2020 and closed on a house in Abruzzo, Italy, in 2022.
zh: Cassandra Tresl 和 Alex Ninman 于 2020 年搬到捷克共和国与 Tresl 的祖父同住，并于 2022 年关闭了意大利阿布鲁佐的一栋房子。

title: Alphabet burnishes one of its best weapons in the battle for AI supremacy
title_zh: Alphabet 在人工智能霸主之战中擦亮了自己最好的武器之一
text: The Google parent's homegrown silicon is a big advantage in the AI compute race.
zh: 谷歌母公司的本土芯片在人工智能计算竞赛中具有巨大优势。

title: ‘She is retired’: Do I dip into my 401(k) to pay my mother’s $30,000 credit-card debt?
title_zh: “她退休了”：我是否需要动用 401(k) 来偿还我母亲 30,000 美元的信用卡债务？
text: “I want her to live on her Social Security instead of using it to pay off her credit-card debt.”
zh: “我希望她靠社会保障生活，而不是用它来偿还信用卡债务。”

title: I’m a CPA and tell my clients to claim Social Security early. Am I giving them bad advice?
title_zh: 我是一名注册会计师，并告诉我的客户尽早申请社会保障。我给他们的建议不好吗？
text: “Only 8% to 10% of people wait until age 70 to claim.”
zh: “只有 8% 到 10% 的人等到 70 岁才领取养老金。”

title: AI turbocharged the stock market. Now it’s firing up the economy.
title_zh: 人工智能推动了股市的发展。现在它正在刺激经济。
text: A modern-day gold rush is giving a big boost to U.S. GDP.
zh: 现代淘金热极大地推动了美国国内生产总值的增长。

title: Going back to the office may actually be better for you than working from home
title_zh: 返回办公室实际上可能比在家工作对您更好
text: Returning to the office — even just a few days a week — might be what fully remote workers actually need.
zh: 返回办公室——即使每周只有几天——可能是完全远程办公的员工真正需要的。

zh: 新兴市场股票：聚焦人工智能、中国和印度 高盛资产管理

title: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China - KraneShares
title_zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国的综合指南 - KraneShares
text: China ETFs: A Comprehensive Guide On How To Invest In China KraneShares
zh: 中国ETF：如何投资中国金瑞股份综合指南

title: China works to build slow, steady stock markets, rejecting norm of boom and bust - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 中国致力于建立缓慢、稳定的股市，拒绝繁荣和萧条的常态 - 南华早报
text: China works to build slow, steady stock markets, rejecting norm of boom and bust South China Morning Post
zh: 中国致力于建立缓慢、稳定的股市，拒绝繁荣与萧条的常态 南华早报

title: The memory shortage shaking Apple and Microsoft is 'existential crisis' for smaller players
title_zh: 震动苹果和微软的内存短缺对小型企业来说是“生存危机”
text: While Apple and Microsoft raise prices on key devices to help cover the soaring costs of memory, smaller consumer electronics companies are in dire straits.
zh: 尽管苹果和微软提高了关键设备的价格，以帮助弥补不断飙升的内存成本，但规模较小的消费电子公司却陷入了困境。

title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
title_zh: 特朗普指责德黑兰违反霍尔木兹海峡停火协议后，美国对伊朗进行打击
text: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.
zh: 这次袭击发生之际，美国和伊朗本应在 60 年内没有敌对行动，并举行会谈以结束战争。

title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sworn in as U.S. citizen at baseball game
title_zh: 伯克希尔首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔在棒球比赛中宣誓就任美国公民
text: Abel, a longtime Iowa resident who was born in the Canadian city of Edmonton in 1962, was among the roughly two dozen people from 16 countries who participated in an annual naturalization ceremony hosted by the Iowa Cubs Thursday night in Des Moines.
zh: 阿贝尔是爱荷华州的长期居民，1962 年出生于加拿大埃德蒙顿，来自 16 个国家的大约两打人参加了周四晚上由爱荷华小熊队在得梅因举办的年度入籍仪式。

title: How GE Vernova builds the massive gas turbines powering the AI data center boom
title_zh: GE Vernova 如何建造大型燃气轮机为人工智能数据中心的繁荣提供动力
text: GE Vernova turbines are powering Elon Musk's xAI Colossus 1 data center and Microsoft just bought seven to power its data center in Texas.
zh: GE Vernova 涡轮机正在为埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 xAI Colossus 1 数据中心供电，而微软刚刚购买了 7 台涡轮机为其位于德克萨斯州的数据中心供电。

title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
title_zh: Kohl's 如何迷失方向并试图再次变得重要
text: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.
zh: 由于失去了相关性和核心客户，科尔从一个家喻户晓的名字变成了一只暴跌的股票。现在，该公司正在努力扭转局面。

title: Straight women can’t get enough of gay romance stories like ‘Heated Rivalry’ and ‘Red, White & Royal Blue’
title_zh: 异性恋女性对同性恋爱情故事爱不释手，比如《激烈的竞争》和《红、白、宝蓝》
text: Women aren't the protagonists or love interests in a subgrenre of romance focused on gay men. Still, they're consuming these stories in droves.
zh: 在以男同性恋为中心的浪漫题材中，女性不是主角或爱情对象。尽管如此，他们还是成群结队地阅读这些故事。

title: Trading in these two ETFs suggests inflation fears are overblown
title_zh: 这两只 ETF 的交易表明通胀担忧被夸大了
text: It could have been a big week for bond bears, if it weren't for crude oil.
zh: 如果没有原油，这对债券空头来说可能是重要的一周。

title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
title_zh: 随着人工智能融资担忧升级，甲骨文股价遭遇 2001 年互联网泡沫破灭以来最糟糕的一周
text: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.
zh: 甲骨文激增的支出、负自由现金流和 1,300 亿美元的债务正在给该股带来压力。

title: Rubio says Israel, Lebanon reach framework agreement aimed at 'lasting peace and security'
title_zh: 卢比奥表示以色列和黎巴嫩达成旨在“持久和平与安全”的框架协议
text: Israel and Lebanon agreed to implement a ceasefire. But that is contingent on the paramilitary group Hezbollah agreeing to halt hostilities.
zh: 以色列和黎巴嫩同意实施停火。但这取决于准军事组织真主党同意停止敌对行动。

title: Walmart heir Lukas Walton buys minority stake in the Chicago Bulls and United Center
title_zh: 沃尔玛继承人卢卡斯·沃尔顿购买芝加哥公牛队和联合中心球馆的少数股权
text: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and his wife, Samantha, are residents of Chicago.
zh: 卢卡斯·沃尔顿 (Lukas Walton) 39 岁，是沃尔玛创始人山姆·沃尔顿 (Sam Walton) 的孙子。他和他的妻子萨曼莎是芝加哥居民。

title: Big Tech is obsessed with smart glasses. Now it has to convince people to wear them.
title_zh: 大型科技公司痴迷于智能眼镜。现在它必须说服人们佩戴它们。
text: Smart glasses could become the definitive hardware design of the AI era — if consumers buy in to the idea.
zh: 如果消费者接受这个想法，智能眼镜可能会成为人工智能时代的权威硬件设计。

title: ‘I’ll happily wait’: Does delaying Social Security make sense for high earners like me?
title_zh: “我会很乐意等待”：延迟社会保障对于像我这样的高收入者有意义吗？
text: “In many states, Social Security benefits are exempt from state income tax.”
zh: “在许多州，社会保障福利免征州所得税。”

title: SpaceX’s new $11 billion ‘saving grace’ comes with a big catch
title_zh: SpaceX 新的 110 亿美元“拯救恩典”带来了一个大收获
text: The company’s pivot toward offering hardware access to rivals could hamstring its own AI goals.
zh: 该公司转向向竞争对手提供硬件访问可能会阻碍其自身的人工智能目标。

title: Iran’s ship attack tests the shipping-insurance market just as war-risk premiums had plunged
title_zh: 战争险保费暴跌之际，伊朗船舶袭击事件考验航运保险市场
text: War-risk premiums narrowed considerably in recent days but could increase again.
zh: 最近几天，战争险保费大幅收窄，但可能会再次上升。

title: China’s stocks have upside room as liquidity, earnings grow: JPMorgan - South China Morning Post
title_zh: 摩根大通：随着流动性和盈利增长，中国股市有上涨空间 - 南华早报
text: China’s stocks have upside room as liquidity, earnings grow: JPMorgan South China Morning Post
zh: 摩根大通《南华早报》：随着流动性和盈利增长，中国股市有上涨空间

title: Healthcare stocks have caught fire, sending all 3 of our names to record highs
title_zh: 医疗保健股火了，我们的三个名字都创下了历史新高
text: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.
zh: 每个工作日，投资俱乐部都会发布最后冲刺；下午交易最后一小时的可行更新。

title: Gavin Newsom calls for national billionaires tax: 'It's time for an economic reset'
title_zh: 加文·纽瑟姆呼吁征收全国亿万富翁税：“是时候进行经济重置了”
text: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said he supports imposing "a true minimum tax on billionaires" and closing "tax-free lifestyle loan" loopholes for the rich.
zh: 加州州长加文·纽瑟姆表示，他支持“对亿万富翁征收真正的最低税”，并堵住富人的“免税生活方式贷款”漏洞。

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
text: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
text: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

title: It’s a tale of two S&P 500s as rotation out of top tech stocks shifts into overdrive
title_zh: 这是两只标准普尔 500 指数的故事，顶级科技股的轮动转向超速
text: The equal-weighted version of the S&P 500 outperformed its traditional capitalization-weighted sibling this week by the widest margin in six years.
zh: 本周，标准普尔 500 指数等权重版本的表现优于其传统的市值加权同级指数，涨幅为六年来最大。

title: U.S. confirms retaliatory strike on Iran, pushing oil prices higher in after-hours trading
title_zh: 美国确认对伊朗实施报复性打击，盘后交易推高油价
text: Oil futures settled lower to post a third-straight weekly loss on Friday, but moved up in extended trading after the U.S. military confirmed a retaliatory strike on Iran.
zh: 周五石油期货收低，连续第三周下跌，但在美国军方确认对伊朗进行报复性打击后，在延长交易中上涨。

title: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy - CNA
title_zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 - CNA
text: Commentary: What China’s underperforming tech stocks say about its real economy CNA
zh: 评论：中国表现不佳的科技股对其实体经济有何影响 CNA

title_zh: 《亚洲时报》：中国股市3万亿美元的涨幅超过了经济增速
text: China’s $3 trillion stock rally is outrunning its economy Asia Times
zh: 中国3万亿美元股市涨幅超过其经济 亚洲时报

title: Bubble risks grow as China’s stock bull run defies economy angst - The Japan Times
title_zh: 中国股市牛市无视经济忧虑，泡沫风险加剧 - 日本时报
text: Bubble risks grow as China’s stock bull run defies economy angst The Japan Times

title_zh: 中国股市创出新高。为什么势头可以持续。 - 巴伦周刊

zh: 中国股市创出新高。为什么势头可以持续。巴伦周刊

title_zh: 新兴市场股票可以平衡人工智能交易带来的波动 - 高盛
text: Emerging Markets Stocks Can Balance Volatility from the AI Trade Goldman Sachs
zh: 新兴市场股票可以平衡人工智能交易带来的波动 高盛

title: Dow tumbles nearly 900 points after Trump reignites trade war between the world’s two largest economies - CNN
title_zh: 特朗普重启全球两大经济体之间的贸易战后道琼斯指数下跌近 900 点 - CNN
text: Dow tumbles nearly 900 points after Trump reignites trade war between the world’s two largest economies CNN
zh: 特朗普重启全球两大经济体之间的贸易战后道指暴跌近 900 点 CNN

title: China's Economy Has A Few Major Problems - Yardeni QuickTakes
title_zh: 中国经济存在一些重大问题 - Yardeni QuickTakes
text: China's Economy Has A Few Major Problems Yardeni QuickTakes
zh: 中国经济存在一些重大问题 亚德尼速记

title: Red-alert heatwaves are becoming Europe's new normal. Investors are paying attention
title_zh: 红色警报热浪正在成为欧洲的新常态。投资者正在关注
text: Temperature records were smashed across Europe this week, prompting several countries across the continent to issued high-level warnings about danger to life.
zh: 本周，欧洲各地的气温记录被打破，促使欧洲大陆的几个国家发布了生命危险的高级警告。

title: OpenAI limits new AI models to 'trusted partners' at request of U.S. government
title_zh: 应美国政府要求，OpenAI 将新的人工智能模型限制为“值得信赖的合作伙伴”
text: OpenAI said it previewed the new models' capabilities with the government ahead of the launch.
zh: OpenAI 表示，它在发布前与政府预览了新模型的功能。

title: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies'
title_zh: 特朗普威胁对“对美国公司征收数字服务税”的国家征收100%的关税
text: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," President Donald Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.
zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统在《真相社会》帖子中写道：“这项关税将取代与该国达成的贸易协议，无论是否实施、签署。”

title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
title_zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息
text: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.
zh: 卡什卡利表示，由于经济继续受到通胀飙升的打击，他预计今年可能会加息。

title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入修正区间的美国基准指数
text: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
text: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

title: Bond yields are falling as inflation pops. The Fed’s tough talk under Warsh is helping.
title_zh: 随着通货膨胀的爆发，债券收益率正在下降。沃什领导下的美联储强硬言论正在发挥作用。
text: Kevin Warsh, the new Federal Reserve chair, is helping coax Treasury yields lower by talking tough on inflation.
zh: 新任美联储主席凯文·沃什(Kevin Warsh)正在通过对通胀的强硬言论来帮助降低美国国债收益率。

title: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years - Yahoo Finance
title_zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，股市20年未复苏 - 雅虎财经
text: Chinese Economy Is Booming, But Stock Markets Haven’t Recovered in 20 Years Yahoo Finance
zh: 中国经济蓬勃发展，但股市20年未复苏 雅虎财经

text: ‘Tell the story well’: China pushes brokerages to shape stock market narrative South China Morning Post

title_zh: 中国经济在多个方面都在恶化 - 华尔街日报
text: China’s Economy Is Deteriorating on Several Fronts WSJ
zh: 中国经济在多个方面都在恶化 华尔街日报
